mapper.select:
SELECT CST_ID, CST_NM, CST_TP_CD, CST_MNG_BIZ, CST_BIZ_NO, CST_TEL_NO, CST_FAX_NO, CST_EMAIL, CST_SYS_ID, STATUS,RGSTR_ID,[dbo].FN_FS_GETSNAME1('1',RGSTR_ID) as RGSTR_NM, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, [dbo].FN_FS_GETSNAME1('1',MDFR_ID) as MDFR_NM,MDFR_DT,SSMM
FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_CUST] WHERE 1 = 1
AND CST_ID LIKE '%' + #{cst_id} + '%'
AND CST_NM LIKE '%' + #{cst_nm} + '%'
AND CST_BIZ_NO LIKE '%' + #{cst_biz_no} + '%'
AND STATUS = #{status}
ORDER BY CST_ID ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_BOOK] (SYS_ID, BOOK_TP_CD, FS_MNG_ID, CST_ID, BOOK_NM, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT) VALUES(#{sys_id},#{book_tp_cd}, #{fs_mng_id}, #{cst_id}, #{book_nm}, #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, GETDATE())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_BOOK] WHERE SYS_ID = #{sys_id} AND FS_MNG_ID = #{fs_mng_id} AND BOOK_TP_CD = #{book_tp_cd} AND CST_ID = #{cst_id}
DELETE FROM [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_BOOK] WHERE BOOK_SEQ = #{book_seq} AND FS_MNG_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO [CESCOFS].[dbo].[TB_FS_CUST](CST_ID, CST_NM, CST_TP_CD, CST_MNG_BIZ ,CST_BIZ_NO, CST_TEL_NO, CST_FAX_NO, CST_EMAIL, CST_SYS_ID, STATUS, RGSTR_ID, RGSTR_DT, MDFR_ID, MDFR_DT, SSMM) VALUES( [dbo].FN_FS_GETSEQUENCE('FS','FS', ''), #{cst_nm}, #{cst_tp_cd}, #{cst_mng_biz}, #{cst_biz_no}, #{cst_tel_no}, #{cst_fax_no}, #{cst_email}, #{cst_sys_id}, #{status}, #{rgstr_id}, GETDATE(), #{mdfr_id}, GETDATE(), #{ssmm})
